calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2005 Continued To Dec-20-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Darius Chan, Esq., specially appeared for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 12/20/2005 at 10:00 a.m., in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-04-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padillar.
John Hanlin, Esq. for Petitioner: Pandora Robinson, present as Guardian at litem for: Aliyah Hopkins, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,333.33
A net balance of $4,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, Powell & 5th Ave., San Francisco, CA. 94080, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Counsel to prepare Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account.

3:00 P.M.
Orders signed by Comm. Kaplan.
